reviews.review_description: This game was easily one of my favourites, good as a superhero simulator game as it make you feel like superman or spiderman etc. But after the new update, the audio is broken, enemies won’t make sounds, punching makes no sounds. The enemies have infinite health and infinite waves, although you could edit this before the update. Please just turn back to the previous version or fix this issue!

this game does let you fulfill out your superhero fantasies it's one of the best superhero games on the quest store but the fighting is just so jank enemy is if you fly to a different building just cannot track you i wish that there were some enemies that were weaker than normal like you're telling me i can punch a normal dude with superman strength and it takes a quarter of his hp and when normal enemies fall off of buildings they don't take almost any damage it makes your character feel really weak other than that the movement abilities in this game are great i just really wish there was a way to permanently remove the utility belt it gets in the way other than that this game is super fun.

reviews.review_title: Updates have brought this one back
reviews.review_description:
I tried this game a while back and was super disappointed but after returning a ton has changed. 

I now can easily give it five stars as it’s the absolute best superhero game in vr and imo there’s no comp. Next update (coming soon) is bringing even better stuff too

This game isn't worth a long review, so im gonna be quick. This game is actually so bad, like horrible. I will admit, I did get it for free, Which is probably exactly what it deserves to be. First off, this game is weird on what it is. I have never once in my life met a game that's neither sandbox, or story driven. Its just, nothing. No objective no mission, nothing. Second off, I hate games that need other people/friends to make it better. Thats not a game, that's vr chat on steroids. Same thing for modding. Third off, there's a free game called downshot, please oh please go play that instead. Overall, this game is actually trash, don't get this. Please oh please, DO. NOT. GET. THIS. There's still so much wrong with this game, but I think I can leave that up to the other one star reviews. One more thing, don't listen to the five stars, there either little kids or adults with zero jobs. and before I go, PLEASE GO GET DOWNSHOT ITS SO MUCH BETTER PLEASE OH GOD PLE-

Mods are very limited with only avatars, enemies and weapons, add power modding, and the combat feels ew, I feel like Im overpowering my enemy’s TOOO much to the point where I punch someone and they go flying, and it just feels TERRIBLE to fight an npc like that, powers are amazing though

Great game to play every once and a while, very fun and heart racing gameplay, mods are limited but still good, multiplayer needs improvement. And the updates are great. Cmon guys stop being a baby beyond sandbox is way worse

This game isn't bad nor good. I was super excited to try it out so I bought it unfortunately for me it came to horizon + later. Anyway if u are getting this game for the sandbox get something else If you get it for the spider man don't get it there are way better spider man games out there this game is overrated af and it's not really anything it's not a good sandbox there's no good story the powers always break the fights are way to easy and it's just over all not very fun. It's fun for like 20 minutes till it gets boring. If you're reading this please try it out somewhere else first DO NOT BUY IT. For spider man get battle glide it is a wayyyyyyyy better game and it has multiplayer.

When can y’all add multiplayer? 

Update: So excited for the upcoming multiplayer update! I’m curious to see how the player vs player physics are going to work, like if you could launch another player across the map like you can an npc that would be the coolest thing ever.  Nonetheless, so freakin excited for multiplayer!

Update: Updates cool multiplayer definitely needs some work but I see the vision! I will say, the stretch and flight power combo isn’t as powerful as what it was, but that’s okay. I have high hopes for this game keep it up devs!

reviews.review_title: fun but pointless with no storyline
reviews.review_description: Game is pretty fun I like the abilities and the fact it's multiplayer with spawnable bosses and NPCs but it needs a story, better graphics, less buggy issues, and most of all a bit more variety from the game itself because we can only go to 3 worlds

reviews.review_title: No words to describe how much I hate it
reviews.review_description: Worst fcking game ive ever played in my whole lifetime, powers are shi, the mods are shi, everything about it is shi. NEVER buy this game aswell, just a waste of money. It should be free aswell, even Superfly is better then this bullshi if a game

I got the meta quest last Christmas, this was the first game I wanted to play. Game did not work when I pressed the start button.
Uninstalled it and downloaded it again today.
I saw online today that they said that the game got patched but it wouldn’t do a thing.
DONT waste your money on this!!!

I don’t know what happened or how to fix it but whenever I even touch any enemies they just glitch and disappear. Like they’re frozen for a second and then just poof. Gone. I like this game I really do but it has literally, in a literal sense. Become unplayable. I can’t fight anything at all. Please fix this sometime soon.

Personally, I think it would be cool if you could use NPC to help you in fighting as if you were on an actual superhero team instead of some of those and NPCs being just enemies also, if we can fight as much enemies as we want at a time, that would be nice too

This game is just a dumpster fire. I got this free which it should be for everyone, and the powers barely work for me, the mods are so limited plus most avatars look bad or skinny, the physics are buggy at times, and there's no clear directions at all. Please, save your money and don't get this game.

But it doesn't work for me anymore my hands are the size of my body it's laggy the npcs don't fight properly and no one plays online or it won't work for me I got this when it was early access I think and it was awesome but now it doesn't work if anyone knows a fix please tell me and when I start it it says 1 error occurred and I have tried going in the settings but nothing works

reviews.review_title: Great game just a few things
reviews.review_description:
UPDATE FROM OLD REVIEW: After the recent update idk if the game can be saved anymore the bugs,combat and overall gameplay and performance have gone down since the last update usually the hotfix would actually fix things but they barely changed anything not to mention the movement is bad now your character will keep getting frozen in stop then randomly start sliding in a direction  and still the nano cyborgs still get glitched out if you use super strength power set and lastly the game crashes in new Olympus constantly i would go to the discord and talk about the bugs but they still haven’t fixed there link code i really miss the fun i had on the game but now after every update i just delete it cause the bugs are terrible 


















I have this game since the demo version and have experienced every update there is so heres my review. The game is one of the best superhero simulators on the market with the variety of powers,enemies,mods and maps its a really great way of living out your super hero role play fantasy. One thing that does bring this game down is the constant bugs after each update. 4 bugs im currently experiencing is that the nano cyborg glitchs and straight vanishes when you use the super strength power set. Another one is that the new npc will occasionally get stuck to the floor after being knocked. The third is that your feet get stuck to the surface and you somtimes can’t move or your character stars sliding and you have to spam the jump button to get out off it. One last thing is that the current character calibration is broken and can’t adjust the leg swivel. Over all the game is really fun and the   And i love how  after every update the developers post a hotfix instead of just letting the game be buggy.

reviews.review_title: bought this when it was first out
reviews.review_description: i bought this game because i thought it was so cool to be a super hero with all these powers and it wasn’t alot of money and definitely was worth the price. then for a while it was fine and game was not bad at all. maps and enemy’s were good same for powers were all good.. untill they started doing updates is where they lost me here. now they got multiplayer and it sucks nobody even plays it as much or if they do its full of annoying kid or the multiplayer is buggy. another issue im experiencing is the powers feel weird especially the super strength one and the flight trigger ones feel stronger which good. but the issue is when i fought a enemy im not able to pick him up it wasn’t allowing me to pick him up. and not just that but the dang enemy doesn’t even fight back?? wtf is wrong with this new update can we please fix this i like this game but why did u make it buggy

I’m just gonna cut to the chase. This game is horrible. It was a nice idea, but I payed $20 for this disappointment. It throws you in with no tutorial, bugged powers, not even a campaign. Just one of those “do it yourself” games. The whole thing is just a horrible money grab. Please, just don’t buy this.

I used to like playing this game for multiple hours, but the new update broke a lot. I mean, there are some good things about this update, but the cons outweigh the pros. I feel like they are too busy making their new game "payday." It looks fun... but knowing the kinda quality that Project Demigod has... I don't have high hopes. But I could be wrong, and I haven't played it yet, so, hopefully, it's good. As for project demigod... I don't recommend buying it right now. There are many things they need to fix/improve, and this review is already too long to mention everything. So I hope the devs read the other reviews and try to make project demigod fun again. That's all for now, and I pray the devs read this <3

used to be a great game that i could play for hours, but after the most recent update literally EVERYTHING is broken :/ charge jumping works 15% of the time, inverse kinematics is completely broken (multiple times my arm was twisted 3-4 times), webs often don’t go where the marker is and i’m constantly either unable to move or i’m moving without touching anything (definitely don’t have stick drift). uninstalled and reinstalled in hope something would start to work but nope. don’t buy the game at this point, maybe the devs will bother to fix it soon
Needs more quests bosses like saving people of a sinking boat or near a volcano and make it so there’s a dismembered setting

Add just a straight up no powers arena where you can only fight with weapons. Also maybe add telekinetic powers?

Great game though one of my favourites

It’d be a lot more fun to play multiplayer with more enemy options, and overall combat improvements. And what’s the deal with the player scale consistently messing up? Not only that but when talking with friends… it’s too loud in game chat, and if you try and mute them, the last thing they said will repeat forever. It’s annoying. Fix it, this is embarrassing for these so-called “devs”.

So I love this game, but there is a bug, where you'll be chilling or fighting an NPC and they just disappear. And every single time you have to respawn the NPC. Hopefully this gets fixed in the future. (4/5 starts because of glitch)
OMNIFARIOUS! ADD MISSLE HOPING LIKE MGRR AND MY LIFE IS YOURS!

So, you know the wave it makes when we punch enemies?? Can we get one where we also slam enemies down.. and also can we get more destructible buildings and the destruction is huge???… basically just a big destruction update please💁🏾‍♂️…

I mostly only got this game to get the closest thing I could to being invincible in virtual reality Lacks difficult enemies ￼and good graphics but the breakable buildings make up for it overall a good game especially on multiplayer and with friends one thing I would like to change is that you could make actual difficult enemies with better powers and better Ai aswell as bug fixes

This game is horrible no objective controls and settings are weird, this game over all sucks there is no story and the web shooters suck horrible game shouldn’t be worth 20$ should be free do not get waste of money

This game went a long way and I love you can play with your friends in multiplayer mode and I love how the powers are so cool this I the best game I’ve ever played but there is one thing your missing is the crimes and good update by the way
absolute awful graphics,uh,awful mods,awful maps and not worth the money.
The game is only for those who just want to mess around with superpowers and fight really fun enemies that match your powers
Bought the game cause I heard its “the best superhero game” and now I can’t get a refund

This is beyond a joke, the devs (they would call themselves) are beyond negligent and don’t care unless they get paid, and it shows DO NOT BUY THIS IS A CON, and one hell of an aimless buggy waste of money.

reviews.review_title: Fun to play but theres SO MANY BUGS
reviews.review_description: I spend 20 dollars on this game for it to be filled with bugs, I have to constantly restart the game because something is wrong and then I have to come back in and change my settings all over again. I had a bunch of mods downloaded and I restarted my game and come back to EVERY SINGLE ONE GONE.
Buy this game
I like the flying and the fighting npcs in this game and i like the maps because I get to fly out into space and ya very very fun 10/10
The web lines are awesome i love being spider man
I got the game and it worked fine then played it the next day and had no sound and couldnt hurt anyone or be hurt myself the help only said only said re install and i did and nothing changed
Not what I expected. The gameplay is just trash. The powers are extremely under developed. Honestly, it feels like a crappy roblox game rather than a super hero simulator.

reviews.review_title: worst vr game I’ve ever played
reviews.review_description: all the content creators on TikTok make it look like the best game ever but when u get on the game the flight doesnt work the enemies dont even TRY to fight you basically just don’t waste ur money on this

I got this through the horizon subscription which is totally worth the money for it. I’ll say, I wouldn’t buy this game on its own, but it’s still pretty fun to swing around and stuff. There are just so many other games for cheaper where you can do a lot more. Otherwise though it’s pretty good
I used to play this game all the time and NOW it’s rated M why?????? This is so STUPID if I could give this zero stars I would. This sucks make it T again
WHAT DO YOU MEAN this game is great and has really good web swinging and combat and there’s a BUNCH of different enemy types and DOWNSHOT IS JUST A RIPOFF OF BONELAB

reviews.review_title: Stop adding things and start fixing bugs
reviews.review_description: To start this game only works as intended like 1/3 of the time, and every update makes things worse because they apparently refuse to fix the 5 or so game breaking bugs. Like I can hardly get enemies to spawn, and the helicopter only spawned once for me and it didn’t do anything but kill my fps. The game isn’t boring it just doesn’t work and they keep adding things that no one’s asking for instead of fixing the actual problems with the game. Maybe, just maybe the game didn’t need multiplayer and you should’ve fixed the bugs in the game already before you even thought about adding anything else. It’s so disappointing because this game had some much potential and was amazing like 2 years ago and now it’s just a mess because the devs apparently don’t play test their own game or don’t care enough to fix the bugs
This game genuinely sucks, I would like a full refund because it barely works and it is terrible.

reviews.review_title: If you like raging over nothing buy it
reviews.review_description: I have tried so many times to get these mods to work and every time my game crashes. Peice of crap. It resets my settings every time and my mods. Do not buy get blade and sorcery. I tried loading one mod and it broke my headset I can’t turn it off or play another game
Modded avatars are glitching and enemies won’t do anything please fix it
It is shockingly unfinished, if its on sale for 1$? why not? But 20$? Absolutely not

The game used to be good but now all of the features are pretty much just broken and the avatar customization is completely broken also as well as most of the features and it’s also laggy and unpolished and looks very bad. The game used to be good but now it’s just broken and it isn’t that much fun anymore. also the items barely work and some of the powers also barely 
work. another bug I’ve encountered is the settings sometimes don’t completely save so you’ll have to change them every time you load up the game. The combat is also very janky and doesn’t feel good at all
Honestly I love this game a lot but there are some problems I can’t web zip bad guys and mods are limited to avatars Bur still love it!

You wait for a game update for months, and when it arrives, it comes with many bugs, as if it were made half-heartedly, systems that don't work, a large but totally lifeless map. I'm not saying this game is bad, it's good, with cool powers and good mechanics, but it's just disappointing that the game goes months without an update and when it does, it comes with many bugs. Also, I didn't see anyone playing multiplayer, and I was speechless. Could that be a mistake? I also wanted to play with random people; it must be fun. 
like a public server
Either I'm js rxtarded and can't figure the UI or idk

reviews.review_title: Huge bug and not even fixing things
reviews.review_description: Gonna keep this short but honestly this game is not that good with updates I tried to fix this bug that I got that made me turn big with the elastic powers and I’ve just been stuck on that form since forever bro like even without me having the power I just still can’t get back to normal and it really bothering me if y oh developers see this for the love of god either give me my bread back or just fix my issue because this is ridiculous and also I even tried deleting the game and going back in didn’t even work
The controls don't work, the settings switch themselves off randomly. Don't buy this, it's absolutely terrible.
This game is cool and awesome but needs more powers
I think it's still a good game the creators just need time to update and fix the game so please don't hate on the game please 🙏

Disappointed with the plus games this month so I gave it a shot. Ran through the powers which were unimpressive and nor very fun. In the citybi almostvimmediatly cliped through a wall. How long has this game been out that it still feels like an amature made it. Maybe that's true but this feels like a free game if anything.
The game is not even playable and all you can do is play around in the base.
Calibration don't work

reviews.review_title: I don't like it at all
reviews.review_description: The physics were terrible. You guys made the spinning really hard to control and the powers were second rate. The only good thing about this game i thought was the enemies but even then they didn't always spawn in the city so I ended up fighting in the lair all the time got boring stopped playing entirely.
It gave me hope and more love for spider man

My hands are flipped upside down in game
And I have the quest pro controller. If you don’t fix this, I’m giving you a one star review. 
￼
Free mods and then I will poop on YouTube

I used to love this game! I had such high hopes for this update, but it's clear that the developer would rather give shi*ty updates then a good game. Before the recent update this game was fun (not much to do) but fun to relax and fly in. Now the controls have gotten so bad with all the powers the game is almost unplayable.
Give me back the 15 minutes I gave you
the best immersive fighter hero
Awesome game with only a little bugs and my only suggestion is fixing some of the bugs and letting players add powers or mod more powers into the game.
Atrocious
When I first downloaded the game 20 minutes ago I spawned in with my hands upside down, I restarted my game and still the same issue, worst use of money ever
This game made my meta quest crash 5 time biggest mistake of my life to buy this stupid game

reviews.review_title: The New Update Ruined the game
reviews.review_description: Idk what the developers are doing with this game. They made an update for multiplayer and it has ruined the game. Before that update the game was pretty decent it ran smooth for what it was, the swinging was the best in vr in my opinion. Now it is horrible. Game lags horrible. I wish I could get a refund

reviews.review_title: Super fun game but it can be better!
reviews.review_description: (Devs please read) for a next update can you add destruction to the new Olympus level like breaking through building, destroying bridges and crashing the train by destroying the track? And for a new enemy since you already have an attack helicopter how about a tank? I hope you consider these ideas because it would make the game so much more enjoyable. looking forward to more future updates!!

First of all I joined the game my hands are upside down and not even facing the right way when I calibrate nothing works then half the time I'm falling through the map continuously can't even use any of the maps without them breaking. Worst game I've probably ever played
This game is straight up ahh 🫩
Very fun mods very good game the flying physics and punching physics are amazing worth the buy it is amazing. I would definitely purchase it. ￼

the game is pretty good ever since they added the multiplayer and hasn't been better there has been lags all over and stuff and from the Loading  screen i press start game and nothing happens i press the menu to go like a level and nothing happens like i have no avatar i had to delete all my progress just cuz this game wouldn't load at all FIX THE GAME

this game has way too many bugs. i cant even load up the sentry mod without my game comepletely crashing. these devs only care about making the game more fun, but they’re not. the continuous updates is making it worse, and worse. do not buy, i do not recommend. get bonelab. at least the devs care.
This game was so much fun and I loved the way you can swing it is so good and fun you can make fun videos and it has multiplayer

First off GET THE TOOL BELT OUT OF MY FACE. I can't even look down or barely move my arms and my controller vibrates bc some genius put ugly blue circles right below your view at all times as your inventory. You can't even turn it off, wtf is that? That alone IMMEDIATELY turned me around from my excitment for this game. No setting to turn it off, no setting for vibration either. When was this developed 2001?!?! Players discretion for those things are SO IMPORTANT to make a game accessible to everyone. Very outdated visuals even for vr, weapon designs are laughable. Game barely functions, I couldn't even load into a match. Just throws you in with no real goal no progression or story this is like a mobile game with vr capabilities.
